en.text:
This is what your morning looks like at Cocotal Golf:

7:00 AM - Coffee on your terrace, golf course below
8:30 AM - Walk to Melia Hotel for a swim
10:00 AM - Beach day at Melia's private beach

This isn't a vacation. This is your daily life.

2BR, 144 sqm. $315,000. DM me to see the property.

es.text:
Asi se ve tu manana en Cocotal Golf:

7:00 AM - Cafe en tu terraza con vista al golf
8:30 AM - Caminas al Hotel Melia para la piscina
10:00 AM - Dia de playa en la playa del Melia

Esto no es una vacacion. Es tu vida diaria.

2 hab, 144 m2. US$315,000. Escribeme.

fr.text:
Voici a quoi ressemble ton matin a Cocotal Golf:

7h00 - Cafe sur ta terrasse, vue sur le golf
8h30 - Marche jusqu'au Melia pour la piscine
10h00 - Journee plage au Melia

C'est pas des vacances. C'est ta vie.

Condo 2 chambres, 144 m2. US$315,000. Ecris-moi.

ru.text:
Vot kak vyglyadit vashe utro v Cocotal Golf:

7:00 - Kofe na terrasse, vid na golf
8:30 - Progulka do Melia, kupanie v bassejne
10:00 - Den na plyazhe Melia

Eto ne otpusk. Eto vasha zhizn.

2 spalni, 144 kv.m. US$315,000. Napishite.

en.text:
Your tenants pay your mortgage while you sleep.

Peak season: $180-250/night, 85%+ occupancy
Low season: $120-150/night, 60% occupancy

Net annual income: $21,000-$31,500
That's 6.7-10% NET on a $315K property.

Want the full projection? DM me.

es.text:
Tus huespedes pagan tu hipoteca mientras duermes.

Temporada alta: $180-250/noche, 85%+ ocupacion
Baja: $120-150/noche, 60% ocupacion

Ingreso neto anual: $21,000-$31,500
Eso es 6.7-10% NETO sobre US$315,000.

Quieres la proyeccion? Escribeme.

fr.text:
Tes locataires payent ton hypotheque pendant que tu dors.

Haute saison: $180-250/nuit, 85%+ occupation
Basse saison: $120-150/nuit, 60% occupation

Revenu net annuel: $21,000-$31,500
Ca fait 6.7-10% NET sur US$315,000.

Tu veux la projection? Ecris-moi.

ru.text:
Vashi arendatory platyat ipoteku poka vy spite.

Vysokij sezon: $180-250/noch, 85%+ zagruzka
Nizkij: $120-150/noch, 60% zagruzka

Chistyj godovoj dohod: $21,000-$31,500
Eto 6.7-10% CHISTO na US$315,000.

Hotite proektsiyu? Napishite.
